title: rubus callayi
intro: Rubus callayi, also known as Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Rubus callayi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
